candidate.summary: Add CLI regression coverage proving a promoted Foundry final rollup can close a mission when counts agree.
candidate.reason: Foundry rollup imports must not preserve stale denial when terminal promoted evidence satisfies closure counts.

expected_behavior: CLI import of a promoted Foundry rollup records kind=foundry-final-rollup.
Mission inspect reports status=done, current_route=complete, current_phase=complete.
Foundry rollup evidence normalizes to status=promoted with completed_nodes=total_nodes.
Return gate and checkpoint bundle allow final response only after closure.
rollback: Revert the added CLI test and node evidence.
